subject_orientation: Prone, lying flat on stomach, facing away from camera
pose_notes: Knees bent 90 degrees upwards, soles of feet pointing up. Arms resting forward.
surface_contact_points: Torso, hips, and thighs are in contact with the cushion.
current_frame_description: Subject lying prone on a rectangular cushion. Torso and thighs flat against the surface. Knees bent at a 90-degree angle with feet pointing upward. Arms extended forward out of frame.

grok_prompt_constraints: preserve subject, outfit state, room, lighting, camera angle and anatomy continuity
